# Node FMS

> Node File Management Suite (Node FMS), a division of Node — secure file storage and team workspace built for small businesses. Public launch June 1, 2026.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and pricing summary.
- [Features](/features): What Node FMS does — storage, sync, sharing, and editing.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans from Free (100 GB) to Node Suite (Unlimited).
- [Security](/security): How we protect your files and account.
- [About](/about): Who we are and when the product launches.
- [Contact](/contact): How to reach us.
- [Changelog](/changelog): Semantic-versioned release history.
- [Status](/status): Current service status.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
